lint.details: 0 errors, 13 warnings (all pre-existing react-refresh/only-export-components and one exhaustive-deps)

nonBlockingIssues.description: validateConfig only checks api_key/consumer_key but not chain_id for chain-selector integrations. Chain selection remains optional which is acceptable but could lead to incomplete configs.

Danger zone 'Disconnect Wallet' performs a no-op mutation (updates name to itself) rather than clearing wallet_address. Actual wallet disconnection should happen through the auth provider, but the UX button could be misleading.

reviewerFallback: Task-tool subagent spawning failed with bun-eval parsing errors (documented in AGENTS.md). All 3 features were reviewed directly in the current session instead.
